parsed.explanation: I fixed malformed XML and obvious encoding issues while preserving the original structure and historical wording as much as possible. Fixes made: (1) corrected mismatched closing tag <PRICE>...</PRIZE> to <PRIZE>...</PRIZE>; (2) escaped '&' in 'rat. & experim.' as '&'; (3) escaped '&' in 'Francoise & Allemande' as '&'; (4) replaced corrupted character sequence in 'Pa√ücions' with 'Paßions'; (5) replaced corrupted character sequence in 'Hau√üc' with 'Hauß'; (6) replaced the corrupted symbol sequence '√†' after the first affected entry with a valid dagger character '†'; (7) same symbol normalization applied consistently to the other affected entries.
